description: Editorial headshot, subject turned slightly toward the light (camera-right key). Loop nose shadow visible; pose interpretation determines whether this reads as loop (face mostly frontal) or short (face turned away from key, broad side away from camera). Two credible classical reads, same key direction.

metadata.review_notes: Photographer-verified: single key from camera-right. Slight head turn places it in pose-relative ambiguity. Loop and short are both credible reads with the same key geometry. Rembrandt is also a possibility if the cheek shadow connects to the nose shadow.
